accessibleWrapper.description: Wraps a child with accessibility annotations (ARIA-style). See [`13_Accessibility.md`](13_Accessibility.md) for the full property set.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

alertDialog.description:
Modal alert with an optional title, an optional body (string or widget),
and a list of labeled action buttons. Dispatched via the `dialog` action
(`{ "type": "dialog", "dialog": { "type": "alertDialog", ... } }`). The
runtime renders it as a `Dialog` surface scoped to the current navigator
(not the root navigator), so tapping an action pops only the dialog.

title.description: Dialog title shown at the top.

content.description: Dialog body. When a string, rendered as a single `Text`. When a widget, rendered as-is.

dismissible.description: Whether tapping outside the dialog closes it.

anyOf.description: Whether tapping outside the dialog closes it.

actions.description:
Action buttons rendered in the dialog footer. Each entry:
  - `label` (required): button text.
  - `variant`: one of `text` / `elevated` / `outlined` / `filled`; default `text`.
  - `primary`: highlights the button as the default action.
  - `onTap`: the action fired on press. The runtime pops the dialog
    BEFORE executing `onTap`, so handlers that trigger state changes or
    navigation do not race with the dialog dismissal.

items.description: object{ label: string, variant: string, primary: boolean, onTap: Action }

align.description: Aligns a single child at a specified alignment.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

animatedContainer.description: Container with implicit animations on property changes.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

aspectRatio.description: Sizes the child to a specific aspect ratio.
Width-to-height ratio (e.g., `1.5` for 3:2). Defaults to `1.0` (square) when omitted.

anyOf.description: Width-to-height ratio (e.g., `1.5` for 3:2). Defaults to `1.0` (square) when omitted.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

avatar.description: Circular widget for user images or initials.

src.description: Image URL; if absent, falls back to `label`.

badge.description: Small status indicator typically anchored to another widget.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

banner.description: Persistent message banner at the top of a section or page.

baseline.description: Aligns a child by its baseline.
Distance from the top to the child's baseline.

anyOf.description: Distance from the top to the child's baseline.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

bottomNavigation.description: Bottom navigation bar. Each item's text field is `label`.

selectedIndex.description: Currently selected index. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

bottomSheet.description: Modal bottom sheet with swipeable handle.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

box.description:
Generic single-child container that applies size, padding, margin, and a
decoration (background color, border, shadow, gradient, borderRadius). Most
commonly used as a styled wrapper around any child widget.

width.description: Fixed width in logical pixels. When omitted, the box shrinks to its child's width.

anyOf.description: Fixed width in logical pixels. When omitted, the box shrinks to its child's width.

height.description: Fixed height in logical pixels. When omitted, the box shrinks to its child's height.

anyOf.description: Fixed height in logical pixels. When omitted, the box shrinks to its child's height.

padding.description: Space inside the box, between the border and the child.

margin.description: Space outside the box, between the box and its parent.

alignment.description: Alignment of the child inside the box when the box is larger than the child.

color.description: Solid background color. Shorthand for `decoration.color`; mutually exclusive with `decoration`.

decoration.description: Visual decoration. When set, do NOT also set top-level `color` — the runtime treats `decoration` as authoritative.

button.description: Interactive button. The canonical label field is `label`.

enabled.description: Whether the button is interactive.

calendar.description: Calendar view for date selection and event display.

selectedDate.description: Currently selected date (ISO 8601 string, or binding to a string).

canvas.description: General-purpose vector drawing via an ordered command array. All numeric and color properties support binding expressions, enabling data-driven graphics (progress rings, custom indicators, composable chart primitives).

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

center.description: Centers a single child within available space.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

chart.description: Data visualization widget with multiple chart types.

data.description: Canonical `{ labels: string[], datasets: Dataset[] }`, or legacy `[{label, value}]` array form.

checkbox.description: Boolean checkbox. Shared rows per §2.6.0; `value` is `boolean`.

value.description: One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set.

anyOf.description: Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`.

checkboxGroup.description: Multi-selection checkbox group. Shared rows per §2.6.0; `binding` holds an `array` of selected values (top-level, not per-option).

value.description: One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set.

anyOf.description: Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`.

chip.description: Compact element representing an attribute, action, or filter.

clipOval.description: Clips a child to an oval.

anyOf.description: Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`.

conditional.description: Renders different branches based on an expression. Two forms are supported: then/else and multi-branch (`switch`/`cases`).

condition.description: Boolean literal or boolean-producing expression (then/else form).

switch.description: Expression whose value is compared against each case (switch form).

cases.description: List of `{ value, child }` entries (switch form).

constrained.description: Applies explicit size constraints to a child.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.
Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

dashboard.description: Renders a compact dashboard tile — the widget equivalent of the `ApplicationDefinition.dashboard` field (see [`11_Bundle_Metadata.md`](11_Bundle_Metadata.md) §11). Used to embed a dashboard-mode tile inside a page (launcher / app grid scenarios).

refreshInterval.description: Auto-refresh period in milliseconds. Omit for static tiles.

anyOf.description: Auto-refresh period in milliseconds. Omit for static tiles.

dataTable.description: Material-style sortable, selectable data table bound to a row array.

dateField.description: Date input with calendar/text entry modes. Shared rows per §2.6.0; `value` is an ISO date string.

binding.description: State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange.

value.description: One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set.

anyOf.description: Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`.

datePicker.description: Standalone date picker surface. Shared rows per §2.6.0; `value` is an ISO date string.

binding.description: State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange.

value.description: One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set.

anyOf.description: Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`.

dateRangePicker.description: Date range selection. Exception to §2.6.0: instead of a single `binding`, the range is bound via **two separate properties** — `startDate` and `endDate` — each independently following §2.6.0 two-way semantics (each accepts a literal ISO string, a `{{path}}` expression for read-only display, or a plain state-path string for two-way binding). `firstDate`/`lastDate` remain one-way constraints on the allowed range.

binding.description: State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange.

value.description: One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set.

enabled.description: Whether the picker accepts user input.

anyOf.description: Whether the picker accepts user input.

startDate.description: State path bound two-way to the range's start (ISO date).

endDate.description: State path bound two-way to the range's end (ISO date).

decoration.description: Wraps a child with a decoration box (color, border, gradient, shadow) without otherwise affecting layout.
Nested `{color, borderRadius, border, gradient, boxShadow}`. Alternatively, each key may appear flat at the top level.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them in a linear column.

dragTarget.description: Drop area that accepts dragged data.

draggable.description: Drag source widget that produces drag data and feedback visuals.

drawer.description: Side navigation drawer. Each item's text field is `label`.

children.description: Custom drawer body widgets. Mutually exclusive with `items`.

errorBoundary.description: Catches render and build errors thrown by descendants and displays a fallback UI. See [`06_Runtime_Contract.md`](06_Runtime_Contract.md) for the exact recovery lifecycle.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

errorRecovery.description: Retry-oriented variant of `errorBoundary`. The `handlers` map may route specific error types to distinct fallbacks.

children.description: Multiple protected widgets; runtime wraps them in a linear column.

expanded.description: Flex child that expands to fill available space inside a `linear` parent.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

files.description: Legacy: flat file list (alternative to hierarchical `items`).

directories.description: Legacy: flat directory list (alternative to hierarchical `items`).

showHidden.description: Show entries whose name starts with `.`

anyOf.description: Show entries whose name starts with `.`

fittedBox.description: Scales and aligns its child to fit available space.

flexible.description: Flex child that may occupy up to its natural size.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

flow.description: Lightweight flowing layout that places each child along the main axis with fixed `spacing`, falling back to a new run when space is exhausted. A simpler alternative to `wrap` (§2.4.11) for spacer-style chains.

spacing.description: Gap between children in logical pixels.

anyOf.description: Gap between children in logical pixels.

form.description: Container that manages validation state for its child inputs.

gestureDetector.description: Detects touch and pointer gestures on its child.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

graph.description: Time-series / numeric data graph (line, bar, area, scatter) drawn on a single set of axes. For node/edge topology visualization use `networkGraph` (§10.13).

data.description: required | Array of `{ x, y }` points (or `{ label, value }`).

chartType.description: Chart style. Legacy alias `type` is retained for backward compatibility but avoid it — it collides with the widget-type discriminator.

items.description: Array source. Required when `children` is omitted.

children.description: Static grid cells. Mutually exclusive with `items` + `itemTemplate`.

columns.description: Column count; may use responsive `{default, sm, md, lg}`.

itemAspectRatio.description: Fixed aspect ratio for each item.

anyOf.description: Fixed aspect ratio for each item.

headerBar.description: Application header / toolbar at the top of a page.

exitButton.description: Override the host-inserted close button on the root route; see below.

data.description: 2D numeric array (rows × columns). Literal array or binding.

showValues.description: Render numeric value inside each cell

anyOf.description: Render numeric value inside each cell

icon.description:
Displays an icon. The `icon` property accepts three forms so authors can
pick the lightest option for the asset they need:

1. **Named (built-in)** — a string that matches a Material Icon name in the
   runtime's resolver table (e.g. `"home"`, `"folder_open"`). Zero-cost;
   common icons are always available.
2. **Codepoint** — object `{codepoint, fontFamily?, fontPackage?}` for any
   Material Icons codepoint that isn't in the name table
   (`{"codepoint": 0xe88a}` renders the same glyph as `"home"`).
3. **URL** — string starting with `http://` / `https://` (SVG or raster
   image). The runtime fetches and caches the asset at first render; no
   bundled asset needed. Useful for app-specific or third-party icon sets.

color.description: Icon color. Applied to named / codepoint forms; for URL form it tints raster icons when supported.

size.description: Icon size; uses theme default if omitted.

anyOf.description: Icon size; uses theme default if omitted.

enabled.description: Whether the button is interactive.

image.description: Displays an image from a URL, bundle, or client resource.

indexedStack.description: Displays a single child selected by index. All children retain state.

index.description: Index of the child to display.

children.description: Candidate children.

inkWell.description: Material-style touch feedback with ripple effect.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

intrinsicHeight.description: Constrains a child to the intrinsic height required by its content.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

intrinsicWidth.description: Constrains a child to the intrinsic width required by its content.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

layoutBuilder.description: Runtime-only responsive container: picks a child by matching the current constraints against a breakpoint map.

layouts.description: Map of breakpoint name → Widget; matched against `breakpoints`.

lazy.description: Defers construction of a child until it is first rendered.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

limitedBox.description: Limits a child's size only when it would otherwise be unbounded.

maxWidth.description: Upper bound when width is unbounded.

anyOf.description: Upper bound when width is unbounded.

maxHeight.description: Upper bound when height is unbounded.

anyOf.description: Upper bound when height is unbounded.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

linear.description:
Linear (flex) layout along a single axis. Replaces separate `row` / `column` widgets — use `direction: "horizontal"` or `direction: "vertical"`.

Main-axis sizing: when at least one child is `expanded` / `flexible` / `spacer` (or carries a `flex` value), `linear` expands to fill the available main-axis space so those children can distribute the remainder; otherwise it shrink-wraps its children. Authors can override this with the explicit `mainAxisSize` property.

mainAxisSize.description: `max` fills the parent along `direction`; `min` shrink-wraps. Defaults to `max` when a flex child (`expanded`/`flexible`/`spacer`) is present, otherwise `min`.

spacing.description: Gap between children in logical pixels.

anyOf.description: Gap between children in logical pixels.
Gap between children in logical pixels.
Gap between children in logical pixels.

children.description: Child widgets arranged along `direction`.

list.description: Scrollable linear collection rendered from an array binding.

items.description: Array source. Required when `children` is omitted (dynamic list).

children.description: Static list of widgets. Mutually exclusive with `items` + `itemTemplate`.

emptyMessage.description: Displayed when the list is empty.

listItem.description: Single row in a list with optional leading/trailing widgets. Replaces Material `listTile` naming.

title.description: Primary text, or an inline Widget for rich titles.

subtitle.description: Secondary text, or an inline Widget.

enabled.description: Whether the item is interactive.

map.description: Geographic map with markers and overlays.

Supports a `then`/`else` expression form and a `breakpoints` map form. The binding engine exposes `{{media.width}}`, `{{media.height}}`, `{{media.orientation}}` inside `condition`.

condition.description: Boolean expression (string) or constraint object like `{minWidth, maxWidth}`; selects `then` when truthy.

navigationRail.description: Vertical navigation rail for tablet/desktop layouts. Each item's text field is `label`.

networkGraph.description: Network topology graph. Same node/edge model as `graph`, with topology-oriented defaults (hierarchical layout, directed edges).

scrollBar.description:
Wraps a scrollable child with a visible scroll bar.

The runtime MUST provide a shared scroll controller to both the scroll bar and its scrollable child. When `thumbVisibility` or `trackVisibility` is `true`, the controller is required to drive the visibility; omitting it is a runtime error. Authors SHOULD NOT manage the controller manually — the runtime injects it transparently so the child scrollable (`scrollView`, `singleChildScrollView`, `list`, `grid`, `pageView`) binds to the same position.

thumbVisibility.description: Whether the scroll thumb is always visible.

anyOf.description: Whether the scroll thumb is always visible.

trackVisibility.description: Whether the scroll track is always visible.

anyOf.description: Whether the scroll track is always visible.

currentStep.description: One-way legacy property. Use §2.6.0 `binding` for two-way behavior.

tabBar.description: Horizontal tab selector. Each tab's text field is `label`.

selectedIndex.description: Currently selected index. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

tabBarView.description: Content area that displays widgets corresponding to the currently selected tab.

selectedIndex.description: Displayed index (usually bound to the same state as a `tabBar`).

children.description: One child per tab.

table.description: Layout table for arranging widgets in rows and columns. Not data-bound; each cell is a widget.

text.description: Renders a string. The canonical content field is `text`.

textInput.description:
Single-line (or multi-line when `maxLines > 1`) text entry. Follows the
shared input contract (spec §2.6.0): when `binding` is set, the runtime
reads the current value from the state path and writes user input back
without requiring an explicit `onChange`. Explicit `value` + `onChange`
override the shorthand.

binding.description: State path bound two-way to the input value.

value.description: One-way initial/display value when `binding` is not set.

enabled.description: Whether the field accepts user input.

anyOf.description: Whether the field accepts user input.

label.description: Field label shown above or floating inside the field.

placeholder.description: Placeholder shown when the field is empty.

helperText.description: Helper text shown below the field.

prefixIcon.description: Icon displayed at the start of the field.

suffixIcon.description: Icon displayed at the end of the field.

maxLength.description: Maximum character length enforced at input time.

anyOf.description: Maximum character length enforced at input time.

timeField.description: Time input. Shared rows per §2.6.0; `value` is a time string (e.g., `"14:30"`).

binding.description: State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange.

value.description: One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set.

enabled.description: Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`.

anyOf.description: Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`.

timePicker.description: Standalone time picker surface. Shared rows per §2.6.0; `value` is a time string.

binding.description: State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange.

value.description: One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set.

enabled.description: Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`.

anyOf.description: Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`.

toggle.description: Binary on/off control. Shared `binding` / `value` / `enabled` / `onChange` per §2.6.0; `value` is `boolean`.

binding.description: State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange.

value.description: One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set.

enabled.description: Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`.

anyOf.description: Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`.

tooltip.description: Wrapper that reveals a tooltip on hover or long-press.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

transform.description: Geometric transformation (rotate, scale, translate) applied to a child.

scale.description: Uniform scale, or `{ x, y }` non-uniform scale.

translate.description: `{ x, y }` offset in logical pixels.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them into an implicit column. Alternative to `child` — mutually exclusive.

tree.description: Hierarchical tree view with expandable nodes.

data.description: Hierarchical data; each node MAY carry a `children` array. Literal array or binding.

childrenKey.description: Field name of the children array

indentation.description: Per-depth horizontal indentation in logical pixels.

anyOf.description: Per-depth horizontal indentation in logical pixels.

itemPadding.description: Padding applied inside every tree row (expandable and leaf). Defaults to `{vertical: 4, right: 8}`. Adjust the vertical component to change row height / density.

selectable.description: Whether a node can be selected by tap.

anyOf.description: Whether a node can be selected by tap.

showLines.description: Draw connector lines between parent and leaf nodes.

anyOf.description: Draw connector lines between parent and leaf nodes.

selectedColor.description: Background color of the currently selected row.

lineColor.description: Color of connector lines when `showLines` is true.

width.description: Fixed widget width in logical pixels.

anyOf.description: Fixed widget width in logical pixels.

height.description: Fixed widget height in logical pixels.

anyOf.description: Fixed widget height in logical pixels.

params.description: Parameter values; merged with the template's declared defaults.

slots.description: Widget subtrees keyed by slot name.

verticalDivider.description: Vertical separator, typically used in horizontal layouts.

visibility.description: Shows or hides a child with optional state preservation and replacement content.

visible.description: Whether the child is visible. Defaults to `true` when omitted.

maintainState.description: Preserve `child` state when hidden. Does not affect `replacement`, which is built fresh each time it is shown.

anyOf.description: Preserve `child` state when hidden. Does not affect `replacement`, which is built fresh each time it is shown.

children.description: Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them in a linear column. Mutually exclusive with `child`.

allowNavigation.description: Allow link navigation within the view

anyOf.description: Allow link navigation within the view

wrap.description: Flow layout that wraps children to the next line when they exceed available width/height.

spacing.description: Gap between children on the same run.

anyOf.description: Gap between children on the same run.

children.description: Children to wrap.
